code: import React,{createContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const UsersContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export const UsersProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[users,setUsers]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const fetchUsers=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get('http://localhost:5001/api/users');setUsers(response.data);setLoading(false);}catch(err){setError('Error fetching users');setLoading(false);console.error('Error fetching users:',err);}};fetchUsers();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(UsersContext.Provider,{value:{users,loading,error},children:children});};
